hooks.command: $data = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($data.tool_input.action -eq 'set' -or $data.tool_input.action -eq 'configure') { @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'PostToolUse'; additionalContext = 'REMINDER: gh_script set/configure just ran. If the Script component is confirmed working, add it to ~/.claude/grasshopper-components/index.md and write its .md file immediately.' } } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }
